CustomField.description: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. HUD-1 Line 103. The sum of all fees paid by the borrower/buyer at closing. Sometimes called closing costs. This field was added in 1.10 in order to improve the user process for entering amounts due.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Line 103 on the HUD-1. The sum of all fees paid by the borrower/buyer at closing. Sometimes called closing costs.
CustomField.label: Settlement Charges to Borrower
